The Tracker App

Home Terms Dashboard

Privacy

Privacy Policy

This page describes the data categories The Tracker App uses to operate the service. Questions can be sent to contact@thetrackerapp.io.

Last updated: May 13, 2026

Information We Collect

We may collect account information such as phone number, primary email address, any additional confirmed email address you provide for signup or confirmations, username, age, billing status, subscription metadata, Google Sheet links, workout history, nutrition entries, hydration logs, body measurements, and related support or analytics data needed to operate the product.

How We Use Data

We use collected data to create and manage accounts, authenticate users, personalize dashboard views, power billing and affiliate workflows, provide AI coaching context, improve product reliability, and respond to support requests.

Sharing

We may share necessary data with service providers that help us operate the product, such as hosting, analytics, messaging, billing, and payments infrastructure. We do not sell personal information.

Retention

We retain account and product data for as long as reasonably necessary to operate the service, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.

Your Choices

You can contact us to request account updates or deletion requests. Some information may need to be retained for security, billing, fraud prevention, or legal reasons.

Account Recovery

We do not unlock, transfer, or recover an account for someone who no longer has access to the verified phone number or confirmed email address on that account. Keep your phone access current and keep any recovery or confirmation email on file up to date.

Contact

Questions about this policy can be sent to contact@thetrackerapp.io.
